event_comments: Reviewed newsletter canonicalization follow-up 2026-03-20 merged duplicate event 1c4a3612-6ed9-5432-b3fb-05fe678264ed ("The next club meeting will be at the Greenwood Library (8016 Greenwood N.) on"). Reason: source-typo duplicate. Notes: The prose block says Monday, January 9, 1988, but the same issue's schedule row shows the real club meeting as Monday, January 11 at Greenwood Library.
